scripts.deploy:functions:dev: cd functions && firebase deploy --project development --only functions
scripts.deploy:functions:prod: cd functions && firebase deploy --project production --only functions
scripts.deploy:hosting:dev: npm run build:dev && npx firebase deploy --project development --only hosting
scripts.deploy:hosting:prod: npm run build && npx firebase deploy --project production --only hosting
scripts.deploy:dev: npm run build:dev && npx firebase deploy --project development
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build && npx firebase deploy --project production
scripts.update-secrets: gh secret set ENV_FILE_DEV --repo Skoob1905/staff-registration < .env.development && gh secret set ENV_FILE_PROD --repo Skoob1905/staff-registration < .env.production && gh secret set FUNCTIONS_ENV_DEV --repo Skoob1905/staff-registration < functions/.env.mdsce-dev && gh secret set FUNCTIONS_ENV_PROD --repo Skoob1905/staff-registration < functions/.env.mdsce-prod
